query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(DISTINCT u.id) as total_users,
  COUNT(DISTINCT ts.userId) as users_with_training_sets,
  COUNT(DISTINCT pa.id) as total_puzzle_attempts,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN pa.id IS NOT NULL THEN ts.userId END) as users_with_attempts
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN training_sets ts ON u.id = ts.userId
LEFT JOIN puzzle_attempts pa ON ts.id = pa.trainingSetId;

  COUNT(DISTINCT u.id) as total_users,
  COUNT(DISTINCT ts.userId) as users_with_training_sets,
  COUNT(DISTINCT pa.id) as total_puzzle_attempts,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN pa.id IS NOT NULL THEN ts.userId END) as users_with_attempts
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN training_sets ts ON u.id = ts.userId
LEFT JOIN puzzle_attempts pa ON ts.id = pa.trainingSetId;
